# Roadmap

## v1.1 (Q2 2026)

- [ ] WebSocket transport binding (`@a2a-mesha2a-mesh-ws`)
- [ ] SQLite persistent task storage
- [ ] `create-a2a-mesh` scaffolding CLI
- [ ] Mastra.ai adapter
- [ ] AutoGen adapter

## v1.2 (Q3 2026)

- [ ] AG2 (AutoGen 2) adapter
- [ ] Semantic Kernel adapter
- [ ] A2A compliance test suite
- [ ] Helm chart for Kubernetes deployment
- [ ] Grafana dashboard JSON bundle

## v2.0 (Q4 2026)

- [ ] Fastify transport option
- [ ] Worker threads-based task executor
- [ ] Native A2A Protocol binary encoding
